data.content: Reviewed branch knot/foolery-d8ae against main. The setup CLI now loads existing settings before prompting, preserves unrelated agents/actions/backend/defaults/scope prompt/pools during updates, and shows current dispatch configuration before edits. Verified interactive keep-by-default behavior for basic mappings and advanced pools, plus additive round-trip coverage for setup.sh and agent-wizard.sh. Sanity gates passed on the review artifact after bun install --frozen-lockfile: bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build.
